title: `make lint` also fails on Linux
body:
I got similar issue to #4814 on Fedora 31, and I can't find related documentation in https://podman.io/getting-started/installation.

```shell
[ajia@dhcp-93-10 libpod]$ cat /etc/redhat-release
Fedora release 31 (Rawhide)
[ajia@dhcp-93-10 libpod]$ git rev-parse HEAD
062c7b8a9411b7d115f85c2df58aeea760b001bc
[ajia@dhcp-93-10 libpod]$ make lint
# Only generate the varlink code on Linux (see issue #4814).
GO111MODULE=off go generate ./pkg/varlink/...
../../vendor/github.com/varlink/go/cmd/varlink-go-interface-generator/main.go:12:2: cannot find package "github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl" in any of:
        /usr/lib/golang/src/github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl (from $GOROOT)
        /home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/src/github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl (from $GOPATH)
pkg/varlink/generate.go:3: running "go": exit status 1
make: *** [Makefile:629: pkg/varlink/iopodman.go] Error 1
```

comments.body:
Did you clone libpod according to where GOPATH wants it?

```
GOPATH
└── src
    └── github.com
        └── containers
            └── libpod
```

```shell
$ tree -L 4 $GOPATH | grep -A4 src
└── src
    └── github.com
        ├── containers
        │   ├── buildah
        │   └── libpod
```

That looks good!

Next "guess" ...
> Fedora release 31 (Rawhide)

The "(Rawhide)" seems suspicious to me. Is it a clean F31 install with the latest updates? Rawhide, and sometimes even betas, have pre-release versions of go.

> The "(Rawhide)" seems suspicious to me. Is it a clean F31 install with the latest updates? Rawhide, and sometimes even betas, have pre-release versions of go.

It' not a clean F31, it's upgraded from F30 to F31(Rawhide).

Curious. I can only guess and suggest the following:
* make sure the git tree is clean: `git status` shouldn't list any files or unstaged changes
* to be extra sure run `make vendor`
* run `make podman` and then try `make lint`

>     * make podman

It still doesn't work for me.

```shell
$ git status
On branch master
Your branch is ahead of 'origin/master' by 3852 commits.
  (use "git push" to publish your local commits)

nothing to commit, working tree clean

$ make vendor
GO111MODULE=on go mod tidy
go: downloading github.com/sirupsen/logrus v1.6.0
go: downloading github.com/buger/goterm v0.0.0-20181115115552-c206103e1f37
go: downloading github.com/containers/image/v5 v5.4.3
go: downloading github.com/onsi/ginkgo v1.12.0
go: downloading github.com/gorilla/schema v1.1.0
-------------<ignore ... >-------------
go: extracting github.com/matttproud/golang_protobuf_extensions v1.0.1
GO111MODULE=on go mod vendor
GO111MODULE=on go mod verify
all modules verified

$ make podman
# Only generate the varlink code on Linux (see issue #4814).
GO111MODULE=off go generate ./pkg/varlink/...
../../vendor/github.com/varlink/go/cmd/varlink-go-interface-generator/main.go:12:2: cannot find package "github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl" in any of:
        /usr/lib/golang/src/github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl (from $GOROOT)
        /home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/src/github.com/varlink/go/varlink/idl (from $GOPATH)
pkg/varlink/generate.go:3: running "go": exit status 1
make: *** [Makefile:629: pkg/varlink/iopodman.go] Error 1
```

@vrothberg  I can solve this issue by the following steps, although it's failure due to missing golangci-lint, BTW, which rpm includes golangci-lint command, thanks.

```shell
$ mkdir -p "/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/src/github.com/containers"
$ ln -sfn "/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod" "/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/src/github.com/containers/libpod"
$ ln -sfn "/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/varlink" "/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/src/github.com/varlink"
$ touch .gopathok
$ make lint
# Only generate the varlink code on Linux (see issue #4814).
GO111MODULE=off go generate ./pkg/varlink/...
VERSION=1.18.0 GOBIN=/home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/bin sh ./hack/install_golangci.sh
Installing golangci-lint v1.18.0 into /home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/bin
golangci/golangci-lint info checking GitHub for tag 'v1.18.0'
golangci/golangci-lint info found version: 1.18.0 for v1.18.0/linux/amd64
golangci/golangci-lint info installed /home/ajia/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/_output/bin/golangci-lint
hack/golangci-lint.sh run

Running golangci-lint for tunnel
Build Tags tunnel: apparmor,seccomp,selinux,!ABISupport,varlink,remoteclient
Skipped directories tunnel: pkg/api
hack/golangci-lint.sh: line 23: golangci-lint: command not found
make: *** [Makefile:162: golangci-lint] Error 127
```
Good to know a clean repo works! That looked very exotic :)
